reviews.text:
The room was generally comfortable, but housekeeping standards need improvement. The small dining table was dirty and sticky upon arrival, with visible stains on the surface.

There was also an incident regarding housekeeping communication. At around 5:00 PM, someone rang the doorbell and, before I had a chance to answer, the door was opened as the staff member intended to service the room. This made me feel uncomfortable as guest privacy and security should always be respected.

After I reported the matter, the front desk promptly investigated, confirmed that it was a housekeeping staff member, and sincerely apologized for the incident. I appreciate their professionalism in handling the situation. However, I hope the hotel can improve communication and housekeeping procedures to prevent similar occurrences in the future.

reviews.title: Good location but let down by utilities
reviews.text: The location is great but there are a few things need to improve. The bathroom hot water is only enough for short duration, even fast bath is insufficient. Breakfast pastries are quite soggy, so need to provide small oven to reheat. Fruits some days are quite bad with fruit flies.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Geok,
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re glad to hear that you appreciated our great location, but we sincerely regret that some aspects of your stay did not meet expectations.

Your comments about the hot water, air conditioning, and breakfast quality are truly valuable to us. We understand how important these elements are for a comfortable stay, and we will be sharing your concerns with our engineering and culinary teams to investigate and improve.

We appreciate your suggestions and your patience, and we hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for a much-improved experience in the future.

Best Regards,
Desmond Loke, Hotel Manager

reviews.title: Dissapointed for a new hotel
reviews.text:
Regardless the staff were super helpful and awesome, it goes back to the hotel as a whole. I pay hefty amount for this new hotel which I really thought its going to be awesome, but I was wrong.

The lift is quite dirty which I felt weird because this hotel just opened last year and the condition is so so for me, to be honest. 

For the price with shower and no view (overlooking at beside condo and maybe a little bit half view of Setia Alam) I can find other options but its Raya, so I cant expect that much. But if the price is still the same even off peak, I would truly forget this place as my options. 

I guess this is to only cater for the convention guest just beside the hotel, and not staycation traveller per se.
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Erleen,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback about your stay during Raya with us. It is unfortunate but our prices are indeed higher during peak season. We genuinely appreciate your kind words regarding our staff's helpfulness and awesomeness. However, we deeply regret to learn that your overall experience did not meet your expectations. We appreciate your feedback and will take it into consideration as we make improvements to enhance our guests' experience. We value all our guests, whether convention guests or staycation travelers, and it is our intention to provide a comfortable and enjoyable stay for everyone. We sincerely regret if we fell short of meeting your expectations in this regard.
Should you decide to visit us again, please feel free to reach out to our management team directly, and we will do our utmost to make your stay memorable.

Thank you once again for your valuable feedback.
Warm Regards,
Derrick Felix
General Manager

2. pillows are great too. soft pillows not med/ hard. 
3. easy check-in/ check-out
4. luckily got to check- in early somewhere after 2PM.
5. staffs were great.
reviews.negatives:
1. breakfast was mid. read reviews said breakfast was great but hmm
- went early and the egg station have broken electric stoves so no eggs for a while.
- no mushroom soup too which was basic breakfast menu to me?
- wide selections of bread but need to slice it ourselves which is not very hygienic. 
- all the condiments at the cheese section were very salty. can't imagine pairing them with those cheeses. HEART ATTACK!
2. baby cot was bad. no mattress at all. and just a thin comforter like layer.
3. bathroom are outdated. fixes was loose. even got a stray screw in the bathroom. 
4. sofa and cushions in the room are definitely not cleaned. got stained marks everywhere. 
5. AC not that cool eventho at lowest 20C. maybe coz the vent location.

reviews.title: Am not happy that my sandals went missing when my luggage was in the holding room.
reviews.positives: Location to convention centre. Easy parking facilities. Comfortable lobby area to do work and have discussions even late into the night. Front desk staff very efficient. Jockey service also very good.
reviews.negatives: I left my luggage at hotel after checkout & was given a tag as had whole day workshop at convention centre. Collected luggage and left in the evening. Realized that my pair of Nike sandals were missing from my bags. My bags had no locks and another was a tote. I called the hotel and asked them to check if the sandals fell out of my bag in the holding room. I was told that it was not in the holding room or hotel room. I had packed the sandals in my tote bag. Not happy about this happening as apart from the cost of sandals amounting about RM120 I am upset that my sandals went missing.

reviews.title: Good hotel but staff not helpful
reviews.text:
I arrived at the hotel about 1hr earlier than check in time, the receptionist told me that they were still tidying the room and assured me that they would inform me once the room was ready. O sat at the lobby for the whole hour and no one bothered to let me know the room was ready until I walked to the reception 10min past 3pm and they didn't even realise anything had gone amiss....

Hotel room was comfortable and the pool was clean otherwise.
reviews.response:
Dear Wan,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. While we’re glad to hear that you found the room comfortable and enjoyed our clean pool, we sincerely apologize for the lapse in communication during your check-in experience.

It is certainly not our standard to leave guests waiting without updates, and we regret that this impacted your first impression of our service. Your feedback has been shared with the team to ensure we remain attentive and proactive in informing guests once rooms are ready.

We truly appreciate your understanding, and we hope to have another opportunity to welcome you back with a smoother and more seamless experience.

Once again, thank you for staying with Courtyard by Marriott Setia Alam. We hope to welcome you again in the future. 

Best Regards,
Desmond Loke, Hotel Manager

reviews.text:
Overall, the hotel experience and breakfast were great.

However, I would like to highlight a few areas for improvement:

* The bathroom drainage, either inside or outside the shower area, seemed to be clogged, causing the water flow to be very slow.
* The housekeeping/cleaning timing was also inconsistent and rather slow, as the room cleaning could take place anytime between 8am to 10am.

Other than these, the stay was enjoyable.

reviews.title: Excellent Staff but Pool Safety Concerns
reviews.text:
The hotel staff are the best and were incredibly helpful during our stay. Everything in our room worked well, and the service was top-notch. However, we were disappointed with the gym and swimming pool facilities. At night, these gym areas had a foul odor that was very unpleasant and off-putting.
There is also a significant safety issue in the swimming pool. There are hidden walls that lack proper markers. If you are not extremely careful, it is easy to hit your head against the wall because they are hard to see. We hope the management adds visible markers to the pool area to prevent accidents.
reviews.response:

Delighted to welcome you back to Courtyard by Marriott Setia Alam in the future!
Warm Regards,
Desmond Loke, General Manager

reviews.title: housekeeping
reviews.text:
I recently stayed at courtyard and had an overall pleasant experience. The room was comfortable, and the hotel's location was excellent, peaceful yet conveniently. 
The staff were professional and courteous, contributing to a welcoming atmosphere.

However, I encountered several cleanliness issues that were unexpected for a hotel of this caliber:

Bathroom Mirror & Electrical Outlets: Both had noticeable water stains, suggesting a lack of thorough cleaning.

Shower Glass Door: The bottom had visible grime, indicating insufficient attention to detail.

Bed Linen: I noticed stains on the sheets, which was concerning.
